_note: Curated Open5e reskins for post-apocalyptic. Wasteland renames over real stat blocks; cr denormalized and verified by scripts/test-bestiary.mjs.

entries.name: Rad-Rat
entries.blurb: glow-eyed vermin of the ruin fields

entries.name: Road Raider
entries.blurb: scrap-armored highway predator

entries.name: Tunnel Scav
entries.blurb: trap-happy dweller of the metro dark

entries.name: Doomsayer
entries.blurb: preaches the Fall was only the beginning

entries.name: Blood Wasp
entries.blurb: mutant bloodsucker from the swamp glass

entries.name: Glass Viper
entries.blurb: iridescent serpent of the fused sands

entries.name: Rad-Feral
entries.blurb: burned husk that still remembers hunger

entries.name: Ash Walker
entries.blurb: bones fused with rebar and wire

entries.name: Junkyard Imp
entries.blurb: small, fast, armed with sharpened scrap

entries.name: Waste Hound
entries.blurb: lean pack hunter of the dead highways

entries.name: Pipe Crawler
entries.blurb: venomous meter-long conduit dweller

entries.name: Shelter Medic
entries.blurb: vault-trained healer with old-world tricks

entries.name: Warlord's Enforcer
entries.blurb: collects the water tax with a pipe wrench

entries.name: Crater Brute
entries.blurb: mutation-swollen shock raider

entries.name: Howler
entries.blurb: cackling cannibal of the dust plains

entries.name: Junta Trooper
entries.blurb: uniformed remnant of the old army

entries.name: Fallout Shade
entries.blurb: burned silhouette peeled off a wall

entries.name: Oxide Beast
entries.blurb: eats guns, armor, and vehicle hulls

entries.name: Overpass Sniper
entries.blurb: watches the road from the collapsed span

entries.name: Alpha Waste Hound
entries.blurb: cunning pack leader, holds grudges

entries.name: Feral Cannibal
entries.blurb: paralytic bite, den full of bones

entries.name: Mutant Alpha
entries.blurb: twice the wolf the old world knew

entries.name: Echo of the Fall
entries.blurb: afterimage of the last day, still screaming

entries.name: Silo Spinner
entries.blurb: webs the missile silo stairwells

entries.name: Haywire Exo-Rig
entries.blurb: empty work-suit on a corrupted routine

entries.name: Screech Mutant
entries.blurb: winged horror nesting in the control tower

entries.name: Overpass Troll
entries.blurb: ambushes from the underpass dark

entries.name: Two-Headed Coyote
entries.blurb: desert mutant, filthy bite

entries.name: Raid Boss
entries.blurb: runs the convoy raids from a war-truck

entries.name: Chem-Fiend
entries.blurb: combat stims, no off switch

entries.name: Atomic Priest
entries.blurb: blesses the faithful with the warm glow

entries.name: Muta-Hulk
entries.blurb: swollen strongman of the crater tribes

entries.name: Trapped Supply Crate
entries.blurb: the loot chews back

entries.name: Reactor Ghost
entries.blurb: drifting charge from the melted core

entries.name: Statue Sentinel
entries.blurb: monument that defends the dead plaza

entries.name: Sewer King's Agent
entries.blurb: spliced spy of the underground market

entries.name: Acid Burrower
entries.blurb: erupts from the roadbed under vehicles

entries.name: Chem-Spill Mass
entries.blurb: living solvent from the tanker graveyard

entries.name: Pit Feeder
entries.blurb: reeking king of the corpse pits

entries.name: Dead Commander
entries.blurb: still holding the line at the checkpoint

entries.name: Furnace Hound
entries.blurb: flame-vented beast of the burn zones

entries.name: Moon-Howler
entries.blurb: settlement neighbor with a monthly problem

entries.name: Nuclear-Winter Wolf
entries.blurb: white terror of the frozen latitudes

entries.name: Maze Mutant
entries.blurb: claims the collapsed mall as territory

entries.name: Old-World Soldier
entries.blurb: the last professional in a world of amateurs

entries.name: Blink Stalker
entries.blurb: teleporting predator from the test site

entries.name: Glass-Gaze Lizard
entries.blurb: its stare vitrifies flesh

entries.name: Spine-Launcher
entries.blurb: winged mutant that fires its own quills

entries.name: Skin-Taker
entries.blurb: wears the faces of the missing

entries.name: Bog Witch
entries.blurb: trades clean water for terrible favors

entries.name: Fused Twins
entries.blurb: two heads arguing over one shotgun

entries.name: Vault Echo
entries.blurb: the shelter's last occupant never left

entries.name: Toxic Bloom
entries.blurb: spreading acid mass from the waste ponds

entries.name: Harbor Horror
entries.blurb: clawed thing grown huge in the drowned docks

entries.name: Rad-Troll
entries.blurb: regenerates unless you burn it

entries.name: Blood Baron's Thrall
entries.blurb: trades blood like currency

entries.name: Ground-Zero Shade
entries.blurb: reaper haunting the blast crater

entries.name: Lab-Stitched Brute
entries.blurb: pre-Fall experiment, still following orders

entries.name: Living Firestorm
entries.blurb: self-sustaining blaze with intent

entries.name: Rubble Walker
entries.blurb: animate collapse of concrete and rebar

entries.name: Compost Colossus
entries.blurb: mutant greenery swallowing the suburbs

entries.name: Road Shark
entries.blurb: bursts through asphalt under convoys

entries.name: Thunderdome Champion
entries.blurb: undefeated in the settlement pits

entries.name: Dump Dweller
entries.blurb: tentacled king of the landfill

entries.name: Glass Widow
entries.blurb: her gaze finishes what the bombs started

entries.name: Camo-Field Assassin
entries.blurb: military cloaking unit, mission still active

entries.name: Tech-Shaman
entries.blurb: coaxes miracles from old-world machines

entries.name: Ridge Terror
entries.blurb: venom-tailed flyer nesting in the wind farms

entries.name: Warlord of the Dunes
entries.blurb: giant chieftain who vanishes in sandstorms

entries.name: Quarry Titan
entries.blurb: hurls engine blocks like pebbles

entries.name: Guardian Automaton
entries.blurb: pre-Fall bodyguard bound to a lost keycard

entries.name: Contract Ghost
entries.blurb: the settlements' quiet way of settling disputes

entries.name: Winter Warlord
entries.blurb: rules the frozen north in salvaged plate

entries.name: Chem-Hydra
entries.blurb: cut a head, the vats grew it back double

entries.name: Gene-Vault Rex
entries.blurb: someone reopened the wrong ark

entries.name: Foundry Tyrant
entries.blurb: reforges the old world into weapons

entries.name: Berserk Loader Mech
entries.blurb: cargo walker with corrupted safeties

entries.name: Elder Overgrowth
entries.blurb: the forest that ate the city, walking

entries.name: Bunker Guardian
entries.blurb: immovable sentinel of the deep vault

entries.name: The Reservoir Mind
entries.blurb: ancient thing awake in the flooded metro

entries.name: Pipeline Serpent
entries.blurb: lightning-gutted beast coiled in the refinery

entries.name: Reactor Djinn
entries.blurb: the meltdown given will and grievance

entries.name: The Vault Director
entries.blurb: pre-Fall mind running long experiments

entries.name: The Blood Baron
entries.blurb: owns the largest clean-blood bank in the wastes

entries.name: The Storm Caller
entries.blurb: titan who walks the radstorm fronts

entries.name: War Machine Prime
entries.blurb: the last tank the old world built

entries.name: The Deep Devourer
entries.blurb: what really collapsed the metro lines

entries.name: The Firestorm Engine
entries.blurb: wasteland legend; settlements mark its flights
